playbook.intent: From first outbound touch on Upwork/LinkedIn to a counter-signed SOW with deposit landing in escrow; pipeline of 3-5 qualified leads in parallel, one close per cycle.
playbook.scope: From first outbound touch on Upwork/LinkedIn to a counter-signed SOW with deposit landing in escrow; pipeline of 3-5 qualified leads in parallel, one close per cycle.

success-criteria.criterion: Target & list stage complete: Prospect list (30 rows) in CRM
Outreach stage complete: First-touch message library
Discovery + qualify stage complete: Call notes per prospect
Proposal + close stage complete: Signed SOW

stage.name: Target & list
stage.intent: Build a 30-prospect list with niche fit signals before sending anything.

tasks.task: Re-state niche positioning in one sentence
Generate 30 prospects via Upwork search and LinkedIn
Score each prospect on fit, budget signal, decision-maker access

stage.decision-gate: Advance once 30 named prospects are scored. Refuse to send if list <20.

stage.name: Outreach
stage.intent: First-touch + follow-up cadence that gets ≥10% reply rate without burning the niche.

tasks.task: Draft first-touch message variant (3 angles, 1 picked)
Send across 5 days in batches of 6 per day
Track replies; A/B test subject line midway

stage.decision-gate: Advance once ≥3 replies indicate willingness to schedule a call. Re-tune copy if reply rate <5%.

stage.name: Discovery + qualify
stage.intent: 30-min calls converting replies into qualified-yes or polite-no.

tasks.task: Prepare hypothesis-led call agenda per prospect
Run discovery using Mom Test framing
Score fit; send 24h follow-up email with explicit next step

stage.decision-gate: Advance only the prospects scoring ≥7/10 on fit + budget. Polite-decline the rest.

stage.name: Proposal + close
stage.intent: Send a 1-3 page proposal, negotiate redlines, get countersigned SOW + deposit.

tasks.task: Negotiate redlines; close with deposit clause

stage.decision-gate: Required artifact: countersigned SOW + deposit landed. Without deposit, no work begins.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content cold-lead-to-signed-contract --format md, agent: faion get-content cold-lead-to-signed-contract --format context, json: faion get-content cold-lead-to-signed-contract --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
